criteria.criterion: The `auth_introspection_*` config fields exist in `McpConfig`/`_SECTIONS['mcp']` (`src/rebar/_config_schema.py`); their derived `REBAR_MCP_AUTH_INTROSPECTION_*` env-var names are present in `MCP_ENV_VARS` (`src/rebar/mcp_server.py`) and `server.json`; and `scripts/check_server_manifest.py` passes.

Unit test asserts an `active:true` response with a matching `aud` and an `exp` â†’ an `AccessToken` with expected scopes, `resource==auth_resource_server_url`, and a positive `expires_at`; and that an `active:true` response OMITTING `exp` yields `expires_at=None` (never 0).

Unit tests assert rejection for: `active:false`; a response OMITTING `aud` when `auth_introspection_allow_missing_aud=false` (fail-closed reject) and acceptance when `true`; a mismatched `aud`; an `aud` supplied as an ARRAY that does/does not contain `auth_resource_server_url`; and `scope` as space-delimited string split into list.

Unit test asserts a non-200 status, a timeout, and a malformed response (200 body that is not valid JSON; and valid JSON lacking a boolean `active` field) each raise; and that every request re-introspects with no caching in v1 (two identical requests hit the fake twice).

Unit test asserts construction-time guards: `client_secret_basic` carried; `http://` endpoint rejected; private/link-local host rejected by default and accepted with `allow_private_host=true`; verifier refuses to start when the env var is absent or empty.

Component test: `IntrospectionTokenVerifier` inside a `CompositeTokenVerifier` asserts an active, matching-audience token â†’ accepted `AccessToken`, and an `active:false` token â†’ None (â†’ composite deny).

citation.description: All implementation files and tests appear complete and non-stubbed. The ticket comment records CI verification: Gerrit change 721 carries Verified+1 (build/test/lint/typecheck on GitHub Actions across py3.11/3.12/3.13 + macOS). No xfail/skip/TODO markers observed in the test file or implementation.

criteria.criterion: `make lint && make typecheck && make test` pass.
